mapper.sql: SELECT d.dataset_id AS id, d.owner_user_id AS userId, d.name AS name, d.datasource_id AS datasourceId, d.sql_text AS sqlText, d.platform_shared AS platformShared, d.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, u.user_name AS userName, d.created_at AS createTime, d.updated_at AS updateTime FROM ib_dataset d LEFT JOIN ib_user u ON u.user_id = d.owner_user_id LEFT JOIN ib_category c ON c.category_id = d.category_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ib_dataset (owner_user_id, name, datasource_id, category_id, sql_text, platform_shared) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{datasourceId}, #{categoryId}, #{sqlText}, #{platformShared})
mapper.update: UPDATE ib_dataset SET name = #{name}, datasource_id = #{datasourceId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, sql_text = #{sqlText}, platform_shared = #{platformShared}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dataset_id = #{id}
